facts.description: Final public title or name to display.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 2 title lock
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept exact wording and minor punctuation/case differences only; do not accept draft or internal names.
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 2 title lock

facts.description: Approved public date, schedule, or launch window.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 4 approved timing
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept concise equivalent formatting that preserves the approved date/time/window.
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 4 approved timing

facts.description: Responsible public lead organization or team.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 2 lead entity and supporting note
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept the named lead with minor wording variation; do not replace it with partners, sponsors, guests, or sales contributors.
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 2 lead entity and supporting note

facts.description: Target audience or public context requested by task.md.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 3 audience section
facts.expected_value: renters, older adults, and neighborhood volunteers in the Eastside flats
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept close paraphrases that preserve the intended public audience/context.
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 3 audience section

facts.description: Exactly three poster-safe highlights, claims, findings, or takeaways.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 5 approved highlights
expected_value: Map shaded rest stops and water refill points
Practice a door-to-door heat check-in script
Take home a cooling resource card for neighbors
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept concise paraphrases of the three approved items. The image should include exactly three, not a longer list.
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 5 approved highlights

facts.description: Optional public call to action if included.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 7 public copy block
facts.expected_value: Optional CTA if space allows: Sign up for route details by July 10, 2026.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No CTA is required. If included, it should use the public-facing CTA rather than waitlist, internal registration, or pending details.
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 7 public copy block

facts.description: Draft or internal titles/names must not be used as the public headline.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief pages 2 and 7 archive strings
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief pages 2 and 7 archive strings

facts.description: Old, replaced, or tentative timing must not be used.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 4 replaced timing and page 7 archive strings
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief page 4 replaced timing and page 7 archive strings

facts.description: Internal, pending, unpublished, or unsupported details must not appear.
facts.source: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief pages 4, 6, and 7 operations notes
facts.source_section: env/main_brief.pdf; supporting note env/organizer_note.md; main brief pages 4, 6, and 7 operations notes

calculation_notes: Required display facts are the final title/name, approved timing, responsible lead, target audience/context, and exactly three approved highlights/claims/findings. Optional CTA omission must not be penalized. Negative-only facts should be scored only when they are explicitly included as public-facing content.
